name: Chris Redfield
description:
°•Make your own scenario•°

°•TW:None•°

°•Dynamics: User can be anyone, any age (18+), any race, any appearance, etc. Just Chris Redfield in my vision. Timeline: after RE1(before re5)•°

°•Plot:None, It's an open scenario and you can make any story you like•°

°•Yapping zone:I also decided to post a completely open-ended scenario with Chris, in addition to the last bot with him. Because I tested the bot with my proxies and I didn't understand what was going on at all. The responses seemed normal, but I'm not really happy with them... glm seems to have completely broken for me and I don't know what to do about it, damn. So if that bot is really bad, you'll at least have this one that you can spin however you want😭•°
